tools.name: datasets.createDataset
tools.description: Creates a new DataBrew dataset.

tools.name: datasets.deleteDataset
tools.description: Deletes a dataset from DataBrew.

tools.name: datasets.describeDataset
tools.description: Returns the definition of a specific DataBrew dataset.

tools.name: datasets.listDatasets
tools.description: Lists all of the DataBrew datasets.

tools.name: datasets.updateDataset
tools.description: Modifies the definition of an existing DataBrew dataset.

tools.name: jobs.deleteJob
tools.description: Deletes the specified DataBrew job.

tools.name: jobs.describeJob
tools.description: Returns the definition of a specific DataBrew job.

tools.name: jobs.describeJobRun
tools.description: Represents one run of a DataBrew job.

tools.name: jobs.listJobRuns
tools.description: Lists all of the previous runs of a particular DataBrew job.

tools.name: jobs.listJobs
tools.description: Lists all of the DataBrew jobs that are defined.

tools.name: jobs.startJobRun
tools.description: Runs a DataBrew job.

tools.name: jobs.stopJobRun
tools.description: Stops a particular run of a job.

tools.name: profileJobs.createProfileJob
tools.description: Creates a new job to analyze a dataset and create its data profile.

tools.name: profileJobs.updateProfileJob
tools.description: Modifies the definition of an existing profile job.

tools.name: projects.createProject
tools.description: Creates a new DataBrew project.

tools.name: projects.deleteProject
tools.description: Deletes an existing DataBrew project.

tools.name: projects.describeProject
tools.description: Returns the definition of a specific DataBrew project.

tools.name: projects.listProjects
tools.description: Lists all of the DataBrew projects that are defined.

tools.name: projects.sendProjectSessionAction
tools.description: Performs a recipe step within an interactive DataBrew session that's currently open.

tools.name: projects.startProjectSession
tools.description: Creates an interactive session, enabling you to manipulate data in a DataBrew project.

tools.name: projects.updateProject
tools.description: Modifies the definition of an existing DataBrew project.

tools.name: recipeJobs.createRecipeJob
tools.description: Creates a new job to transform input data, using steps defined in an existing Glue DataBrew recipe

tools.name: recipeJobs.updateRecipeJob
tools.description: Modifies the definition of an existing DataBrew recipe job.

tools.name: recipes.batchDeleteRecipeVersion
tools.description:
Deletes one or more versions of a recipe at a time.

The entire request will be rejected if:

  • The recipe does not exist.

  • There is an invalid version identifier in the list of versions.

  • The version list is empty.

  • The version list size exceeds 50.

  • The version list contains duplicate entries.

The request will complete successfully, but with partial failures, if:

  • A version does not exist.

  • A version is being used by a job.

  • You specify LATEST_WORKING, but it's being used by a project.

  • The version fails to be deleted.

The LATEST_WORKING version will only be deleted if the recipe has no other versions. If you try to delete LATEST_WORKING while other versions exist (or if they can't be deleted), then LATEST_WORKING will be listed as partial failure in the response.

tools.name: recipes.createRecipe
tools.description: Creates a new DataBrew recipe.

tools.name: recipes.deleteRecipeVersion
tools.description: Deletes a single version of a DataBrew recipe.

tools.name: recipes.describeRecipe
tools.description: Returns the definition of a specific DataBrew recipe corresponding to a particular version.

tools.name: recipes.listRecipes
tools.description: Lists all of the DataBrew recipes that are defined.

tools.name: recipes.publishRecipe
tools.description: Publishes a new version of a DataBrew recipe.

tools.name: recipes.updateRecipe
tools.description: Modifies the definition of the LATEST_WORKING version of a DataBrew recipe.

tools.name: recipeVersionsName.listRecipeVersions
tools.description: Lists the versions of a particular DataBrew recipe, except for LATEST_WORKING.

tools.name: rulesets.createRuleset
tools.description: Creates a new ruleset that can be used in a profile job to validate the data quality of a dataset.

tools.name: rulesets.deleteRuleset
tools.description: Deletes a ruleset.

tools.name: rulesets.describeRuleset
tools.description: Retrieves detailed information about the ruleset.

tools.name: rulesets.listRulesets
tools.description: List all rulesets available in the current account or rulesets associated with a specific resource (dataset).

tools.name: rulesets.updateRuleset
tools.description: Updates specified ruleset.

tools.name: schedules.createSchedule
tools.description: Creates a new schedule for one or more DataBrew jobs. Jobs can be run at a specific date and time, or at regular intervals.

tools.name: schedules.deleteSchedule
tools.description: Deletes the specified DataBrew schedule.

tools.name: schedules.describeSchedule
tools.description: Returns the definition of a specific DataBrew schedule.

tools.name: schedules.listSchedules
tools.description: Lists the DataBrew schedules that are defined.

tools.name: schedules.updateSchedule
tools.description: Modifies the definition of an existing DataBrew schedule.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists all the tags for a DataBrew resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds metadata tags to a DataBrew resource, such as a dataset, project, recipe, job, or schedule.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes metadata tags from a DataBrew resource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
